name: database
description: Esquema do banco SQLite e padrões de consulta

instructions.initialization: server/models/db.ts — initDatabase() chamado no bootstrap do servidor

tables.users: id INTEGER PK, name TEXT, email TEXT UNIQUE, password_hash TEXT, role TEXT DEFAULT 'user', stripe_customer_id TEXT, plan_id TEXT, generation_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, trial_ends_at TEXT, created_at TEXT DEFAULT datetime('now')
tables.tools: id TEXT PK, name TEXT, description TEXT, category TEXT, is_active INTEGER DEFAULT 1, icon TEXT, tags TEXT, slug TEXT, processing_time TEXT, placeholder TEXT, prompt_role TEXT, created_at TEXT DEFAULT datetime('now')
tables.generations: id INTEGER PK, user_id INTEGER FK, tool_id TEXT FK, input TEXT, output TEXT, project_id INTEGER, created_at TEXT DEFAULT datetime('now')
tables.projects: id INTEGER PK, user_id INTEGER FK, name TEXT, description TEXT DEFAULT '', status TEXT DEFAULT 'active', client_id INTEGER, metadata_json TEXT DEFAULT '{}', created_at TEXT DEFAULT datetime('now'), updated_at TEXT DEFAULT datetime('now')
tables.project_states: project_id INTEGER, tool_id TEXT, form_data TEXT DEFAULT '{}', output_data TEXT DEFAULT '', updated_at TEXT, PRIMARY KEY (project_id, tool_id)
tables.clients: id INTEGER PK, user_id INTEGER FK, name TEXT, company TEXT, email TEXT, phone TEXT, segment TEXT DEFAULT 'direct', status TEXT DEFAULT 'lead', notes TEXT, total_spent REAL DEFAULT 0, first_contact_at TEXT, last_contact_at TEXT, created_at TEXT DEFAULT datetime('now'), updated_at TEXT DEFAULT datetime('now')
tables.opportunities: id INTEGER PK, user_id INTEGER FK, client_id INTEGER FK, title TEXT, value REAL DEFAULT 0, stage TEXT, probability INTEGER DEFAULT 50, expected_close_date TEXT, notes TEXT, created_at TEXT DEFAULT datetime('now'), updated_at TEXT DEFAULT datetime('now')
tables.interactions: id INTEGER PK, user_id INTEGER FK, client_id INTEGER FK, type TEXT, subject TEXT, notes TEXT, follow_up_date TEXT, completed INTEGER DEFAULT 0, created_at TEXT DEFAULT datetime('now')
tables.collaborators: id INTEGER PK, user_id INTEGER FK, name TEXT, email TEXT, role TEXT, status TEXT DEFAULT 'active', created_at TEXT DEFAULT datetime('now')
tables.project_members: project_id INTEGER, collaborator_id INTEGER, permission TEXT DEFAULT 'viewer', PRIMARY KEY (project_id, collaborator_id)
tables.files: id INTEGER PK, user_id INTEGER FK, project_id INTEGER FK, name TEXT, original_name TEXT, size INTEGER, mime_type TEXT, storage_path TEXT, created_at TEXT DEFAULT datetime('now')
tables.video_reviews: id INTEGER PK, user_id INTEGER FK, project_id INTEGER FK, title TEXT, video_url TEXT, status TEXT DEFAULT 'draft', share_token TEXT, created_at TEXT, updated_at TEXT
tables.video_comments: id INTEGER PK, review_id INTEGER FK, user_id INTEGER, author_name TEXT, text TEXT, timestamp REAL, parent_id INTEGER, resolved INTEGER DEFAULT 0, created_at TEXT
tables.subscriptions: id INTEGER PK, user_id INTEGER FK UNIQUE, plan_id TEXT, status TEXT, stripe_subscription_id TEXT, current_period_start TEXT, current_period_end TEXT, created_at TEXT, updated_at TEXT
tables.plans: id TEXT PK, name TEXT, price REAL, generation_limit INTEGER, features TEXT, is_active INTEGER DEFAULT 1

query_patterns.select_one: db.prepare('SELECT * FROM table WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?').get(id, userId)
query_patterns.insert: db.prepare('INSERT INTO table (cols) VALUES (?, ?)').run(val1, val2); result.lastInsertRowid
query_patterns.update: db.prepare('UPDATE table SET col = ? WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?').run(val, id, userId)
query_patterns.delete: db.prepare('DELETE FROM table WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?').run(id, userId); result.changes
query_patterns.json_field: form_data TEXT armazenado como JSON stringify; parse no controller com JSON.parse(state.form_data)
query_patterns.dates: Usar datetime('now') do SQLite para created_at, updated_at

conventions.naming: snake_case no banco, camelCase no TypeScript (ex: user_id no SQL, userId no TS)
conventions.user_scoping: TODAS consultas incluem user_id = ? para multi-tenancy
conventions.soft_delete: Não usado — usa DELETE real ou coluna is_active (tools)
conventions.migrations: Não há sistema de migrações — schema é definido em db.ts initDatabase()
